item.title: Innolume Expands Quantum Dot Laser Production With Veeco MBE System
item.summary: Insider Brief Press release – Veeco Instruments Inc. (Nasdaq: VECO) today announced that Innolume, a leading vertically integrated developer and manufacturer of quantum dot (QD) lasers, has purchased a GEN2000™ Molecular Beam Epitaxy (MBE) system to expand production of gallium arsenide (GaAs)-based quantum dot lasers for next-generation optical transceivers and silicon photonics applications. The investment supports […]
